allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update COG for KOMPOSOS-IV and remove supply chain

KOMPOSOS-IV COG Integration:
- Migrated from KOMPOSOS-III KomposOSStore API to KOMPOSOS-IV Category API
- Updated all modules to use Category, Object, Morphism \(not StoredObject/StoredMorphism\)
- Fixed API calls: category.get\(\) instead of store.get_object\(\), etc.
- Updated find_paths\(\) to use string names, not Object instances

Removed Supply Chain Module:
- Deleted cog/supply_chain.py \(domain-specific, not generic\)
- Removed 7 supply chain MCP tools from cog/server.py
- Removed cog_import_deps, cog_import_vulns, cog_import_sbom, etc.
- Kept 9 core cognitive tools \(cog_assert, cog_check, cog_query, etc.\)

Updated Headers:
- Added Apache-2.0 OR LicenseRef-KOMPOSOS-IV-Commercial dual license to all files
- Changed KOMPOSOS-III-COG to KOMPOSOS-IV-COG throughout
- Updated version to 0.2.0

Files Modified:
- cog/session.py: Category.add\(\) instead of manual Object creation
- cog/engine.py: All tier methods use Category API
- cog/energy.py: EnergyComputer uses Category
- cog/router.py: TierRouter uses Category
- cog/schema.py: Updated docstrings for IV
- cog/security.py: Added license header
- cog/serializers.py: Added license header
- cog/server.py: Removed supply chain tools, updated to IV
- cog/__init__.py: Version 0.2.0, IV references
- cog/__main__.py: Added license header

Tests:
- tests/test_cog_iv.py: 16 comprehensive tests, all passing
- Verifies Category API usage, tiered verification, energy computation
- Confirms no supply_chain dependencies remain

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:\\Users\\JAMES\\github\\KOMPOSOS-IV" add core/optimus.py bridges/optimus_plugin.py tests/test_optimus_integration.py bridges/__init__.py bridges/cog_reasoning.py bridges/knowledge_manager.py bridges/session_manager.py orion_komposos_cog/config.py orion_komposos_cog/agent.py examples/production_agent.py optimus_core.py)

Bash(git -C "C:\\Users\\JAMES\\github\\KOMPOSOS-IV" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add OPTIMUS as fourth layer: categorical gradient descent

Integrates optimus_core.py \(standalone categorical gradient descent engine\)
into the Orion + KOMPOSOS-IV + COG architecture as the self-refinement layer.

New files:
- core/optimus.py: Adapter layer \(quantale mapping, morphism conversion,
  OptimusEngine with refine/absorb/yoneda/gap-detection\)
- bridges/optimus_plugin.py: Orion plugin exposing OPTIMUS capabilities
- tests/test_optimus_integration.py: 36 tests, all passing

Modified:
- agent.py: Wired OptimusPlugin, added refine/discover/absorb/yoneda/gaps API
- config.py: Added optimus_enabled, optimus_max_depth settings
- bridges/__init__.py: Export OptimusPlugin, bump to v0.2.0
- Bridge plugins: Fixed logging \(standard logger instead of core.logger\)
- production_agent.py: Added OPTIMUS refinement demo step

52 tests total, zero regressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
PowerShell(python -m domains.grid.run_coherence --synthetic --tolerance 0.02 > $null; Write-Output "exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; python -m pytest tests/test_grid_coherence.py -q 2>$null)

PowerShell($html = curl.exe -sL -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\)" https://emp.lbl.gov/publications/us-interconnection-queue-data; Write-Output "page len: $\(\($html | Out-String\).Length\)"; \($html | Out-String\) -split 'href="' | Where-Object { $_ -match '^[^"]{10,}' -and $_ -match 'file|data|xls' } | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '"'\)[0] } | Select-Object -First 10)

PowerShell(curl.exe -sS -D - -o domains\\grid\\data\\oasis\\probe.zip -A "Mozilla/5.0" "https://oasis.caiso.com/oasisapi/SingleZip?queryname=PRC_LMP&startdatetime=20230110T08:00-0000&enddatetime=20230111T08:00-0000&version=1&market_run_id=DAM&resultformat=6&node=TH_SP15_GEN-APND" | Select-Object -First 10; Get-Item domains\\grid\\data\\oasis\\probe.zip | Select-Object Length)
